description: Canonical cleanup allowlist for clean.bat (via tools/app/cli.mjs and tools/loop-engineer/lifecycle.mjs, both delegating to clean.mjs). clean deletes ONLY paths in cleanable_categories, and never a path overlapping a 'preserve' entry.
notes: user-data (sessions/history) and credentials are NEVER cleaned by clean.bat; a separate opt-in reset flow handles user application data.
Package-manager caches outside the project (npm/pnpm global store) are external and out of scope.
The reference source under .loop-engineer/source keeps its own .git and is preserved.
